request.taskTitle: Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O
request.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O" in phase "Comms Tab Prompt Automation"?

groundedContext.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O" in phase "Comms Tab Prompt Automation"?
semanticNodeLabels: Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O
Automate prompt-building inside the comms tab so the user experience collapses to standard chat input/output plus a compact operations display showing prompt construction in real time.
The comms tab primary surface is reduced to normal chat input/output.
The primary comms-tab surface is standard chat input/output.
The resulting architecture is ready for Victor-mediated automation under Builder Console governance.
The operations display is observable without overwhelming the main conversation flow.

before.title: Reduce comms tab to standard chat I/O
before.description: Refactor the comms tab so the visible primary interface becomes standard chat input/output, with prompt construction moved behind the governed backend pipeline and exposed only through the compact operations display.
acceptance: The primary comms-tab surface is standard chat input/output.
Prompt-building controls are removed from the main visible surface.
The chat surface consumes the governed backend prompt-construction pipeline instead of assembling prompts directly in the UI.
Prompt-construction visibility is delegated to the compact operations display.
The resulting interface stays aligned with Victor-mediated governed automation.
